steps.title: Read the boundary line
steps.content:
The matching boundary line has $y$-intercept $6$ and slope $-4$, so its equation is
$$y=-4x+6$$

steps.title: Use the shaded side
steps.content:
The shaded region is above the boundary line, so the inequality uses the greater-than sign.
$$y>-4x+6$$
The answer is C.
